title: Papyrus #0296: Greek-Egyptian Magical Papyrus
description: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — magical papyrus document.
introduction: A Greek papyrus from Hellenistic/Roman Egypt — magical papyrus document.

translation.text: From the papyrus collections of Greco-Roman Egypt: a magical papyrus document preserved in the dry sands. These papyri document daily life in ways no monumental inscription can.
